name: polylance-root
description: Decentralized freelance marketplace on Polygon with trustless escrow, RWA tokenization, and gasless onboarding via Account Abstraction.
author: Akhil Muvva <akhilmuvva@polylance.codes>

scripts.dev:backend: echo 'No backend server — relayer runs on Render'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:contracts && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.deploy:contracts: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network polygon_amoy
scripts.verify:contracts: cd contracts && npx hardhat verify --network polygon_amoy
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd contracts && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
